pre_founder.text: Welcome to Reindustrialize. You are about to launch a manufacturing company of your own, starting with an almost-empty garage and one chance to prove the shop can deliver.
Every manufacturing powerhouse starts with small decisions made well: the right material, a safe setup, a good part, a reliable team, and a promise kept to the customer.
Choose the founder who represents you, give them a name, and name the company you want to build. I will mentor you, but every decision belongs to you.

opening.text: {playerName} signed the lease for {companyName} on an almost-empty garage bay. This is your manufacturing company: one borrowed machine, limited capital, and a chance to build something enormous.
Welcome to the shop. This is your manufacturing company. You will start small, learn every station, and build it into an industrial powerhouse.

opening.kicker: ZACH · YOUR SHOP TEACHER & BUSINESS MENTOR
opening.text: I'm Zach. I'll teach you how real shops win while you choose the customers, equipment, people, and risks.
Your first customer job is on the planning desk. I advise. You own every decision.
Deliver Job 1042 well, reinvest the profit, outgrow this garage, hire a capable team, and build {companyName} into an American manufacturing powerhouse.

job_shop_expansion.text: {companyName} delivered five customer jobs and reinvested the profit. You are moving into a real job shop with more CNC capacity, a toolroom, and room for your first hires.
This job shop gives you more capacity and more ways to fail. Standardize the handoffs before volume exposes them.
You have outgrown the garage. Now build systems, not just parts.
